definitions.activeCoreJobs: COUNT(public."Job") WHERE lower(status) = 'active'; active ReferTRM client-role inventory
definitions.clientCompanies: COUNT(DISTINCT public."Job"."companyId") for active jobs with a matching canonical public."Company" record
definitions.salaryVisibleJobs: Active jobs with salaryMin, salaryMax, or salaryDisplay present
definitions.locationTaggedJobs: Active jobs with a recorded location
definitions.levelTaggedJobs: Active jobs with a recorded job level
definitions.communityJobsCleared: Independently submitted free listings cleared for public publication; currently honest-empty

governance.nextReview: CTO re-probe before any production integration
